name: pf2-party-codex
description: Archive-first TTRPG campaign workspace with MongoDB source of truth, GM/Player portals, and invitation-based campaign access.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace apps/server" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
scripts.test: node --test tests/route-contracts.test.mjs tests/server-smoke.test.mjs tests/content-contracts.test.mjs tests/demo-seed-contracts.test.mjs tests/demo-targeting-contracts.test.mjs tests/dice-roll-contracts.test.mjs tests/character-editor-contracts.test.mjs tests/character-assignment-contracts.test.mjs tests/pf2-tactical-sheet-contracts.test.mjs tests/pf2-import-enrichment-contracts.test.mjs tests/password-recovery-contracts.test.mjs tests/auth-continuity-contracts.test.mjs tests/invitation-auth-return-contracts.test.mjs tests/invitation-trust-flow-contracts.test.mjs tests/invitation-operations-contracts.test.mjs tests/membership-management-contracts.test.mjs tests/player-management-ui-contracts.test.mjs tests/profile-preferences-contracts.test.mjs tests/campaign-context-resilience-contracts.test.mjs tests/portal-home-contracts.test.mjs tests/route-state-polish-contracts.test.mjs tests/select-archive-hotfix-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.check:syntax: find apps/server/src apps/server/scripts scripts tests -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build && npm run check:syntax && npm run audit:production
